codeReview.summary: Gap analysis correctly maps all 34 Course Timeline topics against mega-question-bank.js (231 questions, 8 categories) and lecture-content.html (8 modules). Missing topics identified with priorities high/medium/low. Output file gap-analysis-report.json contains topicMapping with qbCoverage/lcCoverage status, missingTopics array with priorities, and recommendations.

summary: Feature gap-analysis passes scrutiny. The implementation creates gap-analysis-report.json that fulfills VAL-INV-003: Course Timeline topics are compared against platform content and missing topics are identified with priority levels. All 34 Course Timeline topics are mapped to qb, lc, or missing status. 10 missing topics identified with 4 high, 4 medium, and 2 low priority. Source files reference included for each missing topic.
